metadata.loong_extension_host_action_specs_json: {"open_settings":{"label":"Open Settings","summary":"Advertise the trusted host action `open_settings`.","sample_payload":{},"operator_hint":"This action is contract-first today. Keep its semantics aligned in docs and operator surfaces until a concrete execution lane exists."}}
metadata.loong_extension_host_hook_specs_json: {"turn_start":{"label":"Turn Start","summary":"Observe the start of a trusted host turn.","sample_payload":{"turn_id":"demo-turn"},"operator_hint":"Probe this hook with `loong plugins invoke-host-hook --root \"examples/plugins-process/native-extension-trusted-host-rust\" --plugin-id \"trusted-host-extension-rust-example\" --hook turn_start --payload '{\"turn_id\":\"demo-turn\"}' --allow-command cargo`."},"turn_end":{"label":"Turn End","summary":"Observe the completion of a trusted host turn.","sample_payload":{"turn_id":"demo-turn","status":"ok"},"operator_hint":"Probe this hook with `loong plugins invoke-host-hook --root \"examples/plugins-process/native-extension-trusted-host-rust\" --plugin-id \"trusted-host-extension-rust-example\" --hook turn_end --payload '{\"turn_id\":\"demo-turn\",\"status\":\"ok\"}' --allow-command cargo`."}}
metadata.loong_extension_tui_surface_specs_json: {"command_palette":{"label":"Command Palette","summary":"Inspect extension commands from the shell-first command palette.","sample_payload":{"query":":ext"},"operator_hint":"Run `/extensions run trusted-host-extension-rust-example command_palette` from the shell-first TUI."},"settings_flow":{"label":"Settings Flow","summary":"Inspect extension settings from the shell-first settings flow.","sample_payload":{"section":"general"},"operator_hint":"Run `/extensions run trusted-host-extension-rust-example settings_flow` from the shell-first TUI."},"startup_onboarding":{"label":"Startup Onboarding","summary":"Inspect extension onboarding from the shell-first startup flow.","sample_payload":{"step":"welcome"},"operator_hint":"Run `/extensions run trusted-host-extension-rust-example startup_onboarding` from the shell-first TUI."},"sidebar_widget":{"label":"Sidebar Widget","summary":"Inspect or extend the trusted TUI surface `sidebar_widget`.","sample_payload":{"tab":"plugins"},"operator_hint":"Run `/extensions run trusted-host-extension-rust-example sidebar_widget` from the shell-first TUI."}}
